2604.13733.title: Jump-Start Reinforcement Learning with Vision-Language-Action Regularization
2604.13733.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) enables high-frequency, closed-loop control for robotic manipulation, but scaling to long-horizon tasks with sparse or imperfect rewards remains difficult due to inefficient exploration and poor credit assignment. Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models leverage large-scale multimodal pretraining to provide generalist, task-level reasoning, but current limitations hinder their direct use in fast and precise manipulation. In this paper, we propose Vision-Language-Action Jump-Starting (VLAJS), a method that bridges sparse VLA guidance with on-policy RL to improve exploration and learning efficiency. VLAJS treats VLAs as transient sources of high-level action suggestions that bias early exploration and improve credit assignment, while preserving the high-frequency, state-based control of RL. Our approach augments Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) with a directional action-consistency regularization that softly aligns the RL agent's actions with VLA guidance during early training, without enforcing strict imitation, requiring demonstrations, or relying on continuous teacher queries. VLA guidance is applied sparsely and annealed over time, allowing the agent to adapt online and ultimately surpass the guiding policy. We evaluate VLAJS on six challenging manipulation tasks: lifting, pick-and-place, peg reorientation, peg insertion, poking, and pushing in simulation, and validate a subset on a real Franka Panda robot. VLAJS consistently outperforms PPO and distillation-style baselines in sample efficiency, reducing required environment interactions by over 50% in several tasks. Real-world experiments demonstrate zero-shot sim-to-real transfer and robust execution under clutter, object variation, and external perturbations.
2604.13733.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習 (RL) 使得機器人操作能夠進行高頻率的閉環控制，但在面對稀疏或不完美獎勵的長期任務時，由於探索效率低下和信用分配不佳，仍然很難擴展。視覺-語言-行動 (VLA) 模型利用大規模的多模態預訓練來提供通用的任務級推理，但目前的限制妨礙了它們在快速且精確的操作中的直接應用。在本文中，我們提出了視覺-語言-行動啟動 (VLAJS)，這是一種將稀疏 VLA 指導與政策內強化學習相結合的方法，以提高探索和學習效率。VLAJS 將 VLA 視為高層次行動建議的短暫來源，這些建議偏向於早期探索並改善信用分配，同時保留 RL 的高頻率、基於狀態的控制。我們的方法通過方向性行動一致性正則化來增強近端政策優化 (PPO)，在早期訓練期間，該正則化柔性地將 RL 代理的行動與 VLA 指導對齊，而不強制模仿、要求示範或依賴持續的教師查詢。VLA 指導是稀疏應用並隨時間退火，允許代理在線適應，最終超越指導政策。我們在六個具有挑戰性的操作任務上評估 VLAJS：提升、拾取與放置、釘子重定向、釘子插入、戳擊和推動，並在真實的 Franka Panda 機器人上驗證了一部分。VLAJS 在樣本效率上始終優於 PPO 和蒸餾風格的基準，在幾個任務中減少了超過 50% 的環境互動需求。實驗結果顯示了零次樣本的模擬到現實轉移和在雜亂、物體變化及外部擾動下的穩健執行。
2604.13733.author: Angelo Moroncelli et.al.
2604.13733.authors: Angelo Moroncelli, Roberto Zanetti, Marco Maccarini, Loris Roveda
